name: rasa
description: AI-powered image editor with voice control via AGNOS

intents.name: rasa.open
intents.description: Open an image or create a new canvas

intents.name: rasa.filter
intents.description: Apply a filter or adjustment to the current layer

intents.name: rasa.layer
intents.description: Manage layers: add, remove, rename, adjust

intents.name: rasa.export
intents.description: Export or save the current document

intents.name: rasa.ai
intents.description: Apply AI operations: inpaint, upscale, remove background, generate
